title: Davao weavers keep ancient Inabal tradition alive through innovation
description: Discover how Davao’s Bagobo-Tagabawa weavers are reviving the ancient Inabal textile tradition through innovation, sustainable livelihoods, and partnerships that blend handloom technology with sacred geometric designs and indigenous cultural heritage.

title: Analysing ancient air in Antarctic ice cores 2 June 2026
description: Greenhouse gases trapped in 3,000 year-old Antarctic ice are being extracted and analysed for clues to Earth’s climate past. The gases – carbon

title: Probing Ancient Air in Antarctic Ice Cores

title: Egypt unveils a striking trove of ancient artifacts as the country tries to boost tourism industry
description: CAIRO (AP) -- Archaeologists unearthed a set of ancient artifacts in Egypt including Pharaonic funerary furniture, remains of a Roman basilica and a marble head of Aphrodite, the ancient Greek goddess of love and beauty. The discoveries, announced Sunday, are part of the Egyptian government's efforts to boost the country's tourism industry and bring cash to the troubled economy. At the center of these efforts was the November inauguration of the long-delayed Grand Egyptian Museum, a megaproject

title: New Species of Fossil Axolotl Unearthed in Mexico
description: Paleontologists have identified a new species of the axolotl genus Ambystoma from several fossilized specimens found deep in the rocky outcrops of the Mexican state of Hidalgo.
